title: ageratella palmeri
intro: Ageratella palmeri, also known as Palmer's Fleabane, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective against wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The plant has several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive problems, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Ageratella palmeri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
